creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Rodrigo,

thanks for submitting this update, however it does not install properly
as seen on the following tinderbox log:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/8.2-FreeBSD/hlstats-1.62.log

It appears the sources are not extracted to the specified WRKSRC.
Could you please have a look at the problem?

Thanks!
culot@
